---
title: "Sign-up Form"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "A sign-up form for an imaginary service."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-08-14
image: ../utils/sign-up-form.png
categories:
  - HTML
  - CSS
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/sign-up-form/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/sign-up-form" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
